title: tragacantha striata
intro: Tragacantha striata, also known as the prickly pear, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of wounds, burns, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha striata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into a salve, ointment, or tincture to be applied topically for therapeutic purposes.
